mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance VALUES(#{memNo}, NULL, DEFAULT)
mapper.select: SELECT a.MEM_NO, a.ATTEND_DAYS, a.COUNT, NVL(p.POINT, 0) AS point FROM ATTENDANCE a LEFT JOIN USER_POINT p ON (a.MEM_NO = p.MEM_NO) WHERE a.MEM_NO = #{userNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE ATTENDANCE SET ATTEND_DAYS = SYSDATE, COUNT = COUNT + 1 WHERE MEM_NO = #{memNo}
MERGE INTO USER_POINT p USING DUAL ON (p.MEM_NO = #{memNo}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET p.POINT = p.POINT + #{amount} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (MEM_NO, POINT) VALUES (#{memNo}, #{amount})
